title: Sour Gooey Nostalgic Ukrainian Gouda Cheese Stir-fry
description: This low-carb-friendly sour and gooey Ukrainian cheese dish features a rich and decadent gouda cheese sauce that is both comforting and satisfying.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons butter
ingredients.notes: For a lower calorie version, replace with equal amount of avocado oil

ingredients.name: 1 cup shredded Ukrainian Gouda cheese
ingredients.notes: Low-fat or non-dairy options are available for low-carb diets

ingredients.name: Pinch of salt and black pepper
2 tablespoons red wine vinegar or apple cider vinegar

instructions: Heat the butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute, until fragrant.
Pour in lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and red wine vinegar. Stir well to combine.
Gradually add shredded gouda cheese, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon to prevent the mixture from sticking or burning.
Continue cooking until all cheese is melted and the sauce has thickened slightly.
